Aqualis

3rd class advancement & reclass unlock

INVESTMENT

Grades assume a built-out account. The Sorcerer and Archmage only reach their S-tier ceiling with heavy investment, while the Warrior line (Duelist, Berserker) hits its grades far sooner. For low to medium spenders, the Warrior line returns more power per resource than the Mage line, making it the stronger value pick until your account can fund a caster's full scaling.

Verdantglade

1st class · Warrior & Mage

INVESTMENT

Grades assume a built-out account. The Sorcerer and Archmage only reach their S-tier ceiling with heavy investment, while the Warrior line (Duelist, Berserker) hits its grades far sooner. For low to medium spenders, the Warrior line returns more power per resource than the Mage line, making it the stronger value pick until your account can fund a caster's full scaling.

EARLY GAME

Verdantglade clears with any class. There is no meaningful gap at this tier. Pick the class you want to play long-term and focus on leveling.

fantomons.text:
SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB
Sword x Staff
Database
LIVE
Patch 1.0
Reset in 21:49:23 (9:00 AM AST)
EDEN
RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN
SKILLS
FANTOMONS
COMPANIONS
RARITY
ALL
RAINBOW
SSR
SR
13 of 13 Fantomons
13 Fantomons indexed.
Aegiswing
RAINBOW
Radiant Sanctuary
PASSIVE

At the start of battle, grants the character Guardian Angel for 3 turns. When this status expires, restores 50% of their lost HP and grants them Power Unsealed for the entire battle.

Radiant Halo
TECHNIQUE

Selects a grid within 3 grids of the caster. Deals Light DMG once to all enemies within a 1-grid square area around the target grid, with a 50% base chance to inflict Taunt for 2 turns.

Divine Retribution
TECHNIQUE

Selects a grid within 3 grids of the caster. Deals Light DMG once to all enemies within a 1-grid square area around the target grid, with a 50% base chance to inflict Retribution for 2 turns.

Bright Conviction
PASSIVE

Reduces DMG taken from Taunted enemies.

Armopi
SSR
Armor Protection
PASSIVE

Grants 1 stack of DEF Up at the end of the caster's turn. At 3 stacks, removes all stacks to grant a shield based on the caster's DEF.

Dash
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster.

Heavy Protection
TECHNIQUE

Grants a shield based on the Fantomon's DEF to the owner within 2 grids of the caster, lasting 2 turns.

Boaro
SR
Mountain Protection
PASSIVE

Triggers when the caster cumulatively loses 15% of max HP, granting a shield based on the caster's DEF. Can trigger up to 5 times per battle.

Crash
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster.

Mountain Charge
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster, with a 100% base chance to knock them back by 1 grid.

Chomusuke
SR
Just a Kitty?
PASSIVE

Chomusuke instinctively provides support. When a character casts a damaging Technique on enemy targets, Chomusuke enables the character to launch an extra attack, dealing Physical DMG once to all enemies within 1 grid of a hit target , with a 50% base chance to reduce their DEF by 15% for 1 turn. Can trigger only once per turn.

Falko
SR
Golden Flash
PASSIVE

When a damaging Technique is used on enemies, deals Physical DMG once to one of the targets and all enemies 1 grid around.

Golden Feather
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster.

Golden Storm
TECHNIQUE

Selects a grid within 4 grids of the caster. Deals Physical DMG 3 times to all enemies within a 1-grid square area around the target grid.

Herbote
SSR
Emergency Aid
PASSIVE

If the caster starts a turn with HP below 80%, heals the caster once, with a 50% chance to randomly dispel 1 status ailment or debuff.

Quick Fix
TECHNIQUE

Heals 1 ally within 2 grids of the caster once.

Cure All
TECHNIQUE

Heals the owner within 2 grids of the caster once, and grants 1 random buff (+10% ATK, +10% DEF, or +10% SPD) to them for 1 turn.

Kels
SSR
Purging Spell
PASSIVE

When a damaging Technique is used on enemies, deals Water DMG once to one of the targets and randomly dispels 1 buff. Can trigger only once per turn.

Water Orb
TECHNIQUE

Deals Water DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster.

Water Drill
TECHNIQUE

Deals Water DMG once to all enemies in a 1×4 grid area in front of the caster, with a 50% base chance to reduce their DEF by 20% for 2 turns.

Mandragora
SR
Natural Power
PASSIVE

When a Technique is used on allies, heals 1 target once.

Flying Leaf
TECHNIQUE

Deals Wind DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster.

Wakening of Vitality
TECHNIQUE

Heals 1 ally (caster excluded) within 4 grids of the caster once.

Nyxarchon
RAINBOW
Requiem Blast
PASSIVE

When a damaging Technique is used on enemies, deals Dark DMG once to one of the targets and all enemies 2 grids around, with a 100% chance to inflict 1 stack of 10% DEF Reduction (max 3 stacks) for 2 turns. Can trigger only twice every 2 turns. (Large targets may take multiple hits.)

Shadow Sweep
TECHNIQUE

Deals Dark DMG once to all enemies within a 3×2 grid area in front of the caster.

Nightshade Blast
TECHNIQUE

Deals Dark DMG once to 1 enemy within 2 grids of the caster. For every 5% HP lost by an enemy, this skill deals 5% more DMG to that enemy, up to a max of 50% increase. Skill cooldown resets upon materialization.

Death Star Scatter
PASSIVE

Killing an enemy deals additional Dark DMG once to all enemies within 2 grids of the target.

Pandarial
RAINBOW
Ink Burst
PASSIVE

At the start of battle, reduces the CD of all Techniques by 1 turn for the character, and grants a DMG Boost for the entire battle.

Bamboo Gale
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster, with a 50% chance to deal 1.5x DMG.

Verdant Spikes
TECHNIQUE

Selects a target within 4 grids of the caster, and deals Physical DMG once to all enemies within a 1-grid square area of that target, with a 100% base chance to inflict Fragility for 1 turn.

Emerald Dew
PASSIVE

Heals allies within 4 grids of the caster once at turn start. (If an ally is within multiple Emerald Dew ranges from Pandarial, only the newest effect applies.)

Sylvaerie
SSR
Wind Embrace
PASSIVE

Increases the caster's ATK and SPD for 1 turn after the caster's turn ends.

Glow Glob
TECHNIQUE

Deals Wind DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster.

Slow Wind Shot
TECHNIQUE

Deals Wind DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster, with a 60% base chance to delay the target's action by 15%.

Terragon
SSR
Sandstone Shot
PASSIVE

When a damaging Technique is used on enemies, deals Physical DMG once to one of the targets, with a 50% base chance to reduce their ATK by 25% for 1 turn. Can trigger only once per turn.

Tail Lash
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster.

Falling Sand
TECHNIQUE

Deals Physical DMG once to all enemies within a 3×2 grid area in front of you, with a 50% base chance to reduce their DMG by 15% for 2 turns.

Zeioletus
SSR
Lotus Step
PASSIVE

When a damaging Technique is used on enemies, deals Light DMG once to one of the targets and all enemies 1 grid around, knocking them airborne. Can trigger only twice every 2 turns. (Deals 20% more DMG to large targets.)

Aura Shot
TECHNIQUE

Deals Light DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster. (Deals 20% more DMG to large targets.)

Bolt from the Blue
TECHNIQUE

Selects a grid within 6 grids of the caster. Deals Light DMG once to all enemies within a 1-grid square area around the target grid and knocks them airborne. (Deals 20% more DMG to large targets.)

roadmap.text:
SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB
Sword x Staff
Roadmap
LIVE
Patch 1.0
Reset in 21:49:17 (9:00 AM AST)
EDEN
RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN

ENDGAME ROADMAP

A day-by-day progression route from the Verdantglade launch window to the Season 5 Hapadi unlock, compiled by EOG analysts and laid out on a visual timeline by Eden of Gaming. Every region gate, dungeon power wall, job change, and reward window is plotted below. Use the filters to isolate just the dungeons you need to out-gear, or the treasure windows you can't afford to miss. Power values are placeholders pending live-server confirmation.

Dates count from the global launch on May 19, 2026 in server time (Asia, GMT+7). Past days are actual; upcoming dates are estimates (marked with ~) projected from the cadence and can shift with patches, maintenance, or schedule changes. The daily reset is 8:00 PM (GMT+7), which is 6:00 AM PT / 9:00 AM ET the same calendar day for North American players, so each date below holds in both regions.
